offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late audits. We provide invoice aggregation instead of manual data entry into spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in compiling invoice data for monthly audits
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums where Etsy sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try invoice extraction on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly updates in relevant community
